header: Company Values for polished people story
subheadline: Gives the people section a sharp editorial voice with credible roles, concise bios, and modern visual support.

value_items.title: Team signal
value_items.description: A sharp, production-minded company values using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so candidates and partners can make the organization feel sharp, human, and credible.

value_items.title: Culture proof
value_items.description: Built to show the company values with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

value_items.title: Leadership note
value_items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this company values easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

value_items.title: People detail
value_items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.
